prompt: 使用SVG创建垂直柱状图，展示月度网站流量：Jan=12400, Feb=15600, Mar=18200, Apr=14800, May=21000, Jun=19500。包含带标签的X-axis（月份）、带网格线的Y-axis、标题'Monthly Website Traffic 2024'、每个条形上方的数值标签。Blue gradient bars。No external libraries。

test_cases.name: Values shown
Prompt value 12400 on page
Prompt value 15600 on page
Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_12]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["monthly website traffic 2024", "12,400", "21,000", "12400,", "15600,", "18200,"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: 5个条形
数据显示
Hover on bar shows exact value

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: 使用SVG创建分组柱状图，比较两个产品的Q1-Q4收入。产品A：Q1=45K，Q2=52K，Q3=48K，Q4=61K。产品B：Q1=38K，Q2=41K，Q3=55K，Q4=49K。每季度柱状图并排显示，不同颜色（蓝色/橙色）并带图例。悬停效果：柱状图高亮并显示包含精确数值的tooltip。加载时柱状图从底部向上生长的动画。Y轴使用美元刻度，带网格线。标题和副标题。

test_cases.name: 8 bars
Legend binds Product A and Product B to the grouped revenue series instead of a generic chart shell

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'');const ok=/Product A/i.test(text)&&/Product B/i.test(text)&&/Q1/.test(text)&&/Q4/.test(text);const legend=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text, text, span, div, li')].filter(el=>/Product A|Product B/i.test(el.textContent||'')).length>=2;return ok&&legend;})()

test_cases.name: Quarter labels Q1-Q4 stay coupled to a grouped eight-bar structure

steps.expression: (()=>{const labels=['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'].every(q=>(document.body.innerText||'').includes(q));const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;});return labels&&rects.length>=8;})()

test_cases.name: Bar-load animation changes visible bar heights during initial settle instead of rendering a static final frame

steps.expression: (()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;}); window.__r29_bar_anim_before=rects.map(el=>Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().height)).join('|'); return rects.length>=8;})()

(()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;}); const after=rects.map(el=>Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().height)).join('|'); return rects.length>=8 && after!==window.__r29_bar_anim_before;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{return (document.body.innerText.match(/\d[\d,.%kKmM]*/g)||[]).length>=4;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const bars=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, rect, [class*=bar]').length>=4; const labels=document.querySelectorAll('svg text, text').length>=4 || /jan|feb|mar|apr|may|jun|q1|q2|q3|q4/i.test(document.body.innerText); return bars&&labels;})()

test_cases.name: Chart axis shows labels from prompt (Q1/Q4/...)
Hover tooltip stays tied to the hovered bar state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__bar_t_before=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const bars=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>4&&r.height>8;});const el=bars[bars.length-1];if(!el)return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true,clientX:r.left+2,clientY:r.top+2}));el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousemove',{bubbles:true,clientX:r.left+3,clientY:r.top+3}));return true;})()

test_cases.name: Line chart binds all seven prompt day-temperature pairs

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=="none"&&s.visibility!=="hidden"&&parseFloat(s.opacity||"1")>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};function norm(s){return (s||"").toString().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g," ");}const html=norm(document.documentElement.innerHTML);const body=norm(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||"");const compact=html.replace(/[^a-z0-9.]+/g,"");const pairs=[["mon","18"],["tue","22"],["wed","20"],["thu","25"],["fri","23"],["sat","19"],["sun","21"]];function nearby(day,value){const i=html.indexOf(day);if(i<0)return false;return html.slice(Math.max(0,i-180),i+240).includes(value);}const labelsOk=pairs.every(p=>body.includes(p[0])||html.includes(">"+p[0])||html.includes("="+p[0]));const valuesOk=pairs.every(p=>body.includes(p[1])||html.includes(p[1]));const pairOk=pairs.every(p=>compact.includes(p[0]+p[1])||compact.includes(p[0]+"temp"+p[1])||compact.includes(p[0]+"temperature"+p[1])||nearby(p[0],p[1]));const svg=document.querySelector("svg");const points=[...document.querySelectorAll("svg circle, svg ellipse")].filter(visible).length;const line=document.querySelectorAll("svg path, svg polyline").length>0;return !!svg&&line&&points>=7&&labelsOk&&valuesOk&&pairOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 使用SVG创建面积图，显示24小时内的CPU使用率。每小时数据点（0-23小时）：15,12,8,5,4,3,6,25,65,78,82,75,68,72,80,85,78,62,45,35,28,22,18,16。使用渐变填充曲线下方面积（绿色<50%，黄色50-80%，红色>80%）。在50%和80%处添加水平阈值线。每4小时显示时间标签。动画效果：线条渐进绘制。悬停显示精确数值。标题：Server CPU Usage (24h)。

test_cases.name: Area path
CPU chart animates over exact 0-23h domain with 50/80 thresholds

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0};const norm=s=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text')].filter(visible).map(e=>norm(e.textContent)).filter(Boolean);const hasTick=h=>labels.some(t=>new RegExp('^0?'+h+'\\s*(h|:00)?$','i').test(t));const required=[0,4,8,12,16,20].every(hasTick);const forbidden=labels.some(t=>/^(23\s*h?|23:00|24\s*h?|24:00)$/i.test(t));const threshold50=labels.some(t=>/^50\s*%?$/.test(t)||/^50%/.test(t));const threshold80=labels.some(t=>/^80\s*%?$/.test(t)||/^80%/.test(t));const paths=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg path')].filter(visible).length;return required&&!forbidden&&threshold50&&threshold80&&paths>=2;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');if(!svg)return false;function norm(s){return String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text')].map(el=>norm(el.textContent)).filter(Boolean);const labelText=labels.join(' ');const pageText=norm((document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'')+' '+labelText);const needed=['0','4','8','12','16','20'];const hasTick=h=>labels.some(t=>new RegExp('^0?'+h+'\\s*(h|:00)?$','i').test(t));const exactTicks=needed.every(hasTick);const badExtra=labels.some(t=>/^(23|24)\s*(h|:00)?$/i.test(t));const thresholdOk=/(^|\D)50\s*%(\D|$)/.test(pageText)&&/(^|\D)80\s*%(\D|$)/.test(pageText);const geometryOk=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg polyline').length>=1;return geometryOk&&thresholdOk&&exactTicks&&!badExtra;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个可交互的实时折线图, 单个HTML文件, SVG渲染。模拟实时数据: 每秒新增一个随机数据点(20-80范围), 最多显示最近60个点(1分钟窗口), 旧数据滑出左侧。双Y轴: 左轴为数值, 右轴为移动平均(5点)。鼠标悬停显示十字准线和精确数值。缩放: 鼠标滚轮放大/缩小时间窗口(30s-120s)。暂停/恢复按钮。统计面板: 当前值/最大值/最小值/平均值/标准差。深色主题, 霓虹绿线条。导出当前数据为CSV。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 使用SVG构建一个交互式环形图（donut chart），显示项目时间分配：Development 35%，Testing 20%，Design 15%，Meetings 15%，Documentation 10%，Admin 5%。悬停切片使其向外展开，并显示包含类别名称、百分比和小时数（基于40小时工作周）的tooltip。点击切片可切换下方显示详细分解的详情面板。入场动画：切片从中心向外生长。图例切换：点击隐藏/显示类别。中心文本更新以显示悬停的类别。

test_cases.name: Donut chart binds all six categories to exact percentage and hour values

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ');const cats=['Development','Testing','Design','Meetings','Documentation','Admin'].every(x=>new RegExp(x,'i').test(text));const pct=['35','20','15','10','5'].filter(v=>new RegExp(v+'\\s*%').test(text)).length>=5;const hrs=['14','8','6','4','2'].filter(v=>new RegExp(v+'\\s*h').test(text)).length>=5;return cats&&pct&&hrs;})()

(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const detail=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,div,aside,li')].some(el=>/Documentation/i.test(el.innerText||'') && (el.querySelectorAll('li,tr,p,div').length>=3 || /sub|breakdown|api|guide|notes/i.test(el.innerText||'')));return text!==window.__pie_before && detail;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 使用SVG创建嵌套环形图（sunburst）。外环：按地区划分的收入（Americas 45%，Europe 30%，Asia 20%，Other 5%）。内环：每个地区内按产品划分的收入（Product A/B/C划分）。Americas：A=20%，B=15%，C=10%。Europe：A=12%，B=10%，C=8%。Asia：A=8%，B=7%，C=5%。每个地区使用不同色系（Americas使用blues，Europe使用greens，Asia使用reds）。Hover显示breadcrumb trail（Region > Product > %）。点击内环zoom into该地区only。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个可编辑的饼图生成器, 单个HTML文件, SVG渲染。用户输入: 动态添加/删除数据项(名称+数值), 最少2项最多8项。实时更新饼图。功能: 切换饼图/环形图模式, 切换2D/3D视角(CSS transform模拟3D倾斜), 自定义配色(每段可选颜色), 显示/隐藏百分比标签, 显示/隐藏图例, 动画开关。导出为SVG文件(下载)。旋转动画: 缓慢自动旋转(可暂停)。数据验证: 自动计算百分比, 值不能为负。预设3套配色方案可选。

prompt: 使用SVG创建一个散点图，展示学习时长与测试成绩之间的关系。数据：(2,55), (3,62), (4,70), (5,73), (6,80), (7,85), (3.5,58), (5.5,76), (8,92), (1.5,48), (4.5,68), (6.5,82)。X轴：Study Hours (0-10)。Y轴：Test Score (0-100)。蓝色圆点。标题：Study Hours vs Test Score。网格线和坐标轴标签。

test_cases.name: Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_09]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["0-100", "0-10", "3.5,58", "5.5,76", "1.5,48", "4.5,68"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 使用 SVG 创建具有缩放和平移功能的交互式散点图。100 个数据点（预生成随机：X 0-1000，Y 0-1000，大小 5-30，按 4 个类别着色）。功能：鼠标滚轮缩放（2x-20x），点击拖动平移，橡皮筋选择（拖动选择矩形，选中点高亮并显示统计信息）。套索选择模式切换。悬停时显示 Tooltip。筛选面板：每个类别的复选框。缩放时坐标轴重新缩放。重置缩放按钮。角落中的缩略图显示完整数据集及视口矩形。点计数显示随筛选/选择更新。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).map(svg=>({svg,r:svg.getBoundingClientRect()})).filter(o=>o.r.width>180&&o.r.height>180).sort((a,b)=>b.r.width*b.r.height-a.r.width*a.r.height);if(!svgs.length)return false;const main=svgs[0].svg;const pts=[...main.querySelectorAll('circle,.data-point')].filter(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const b=el.getBoundingClientRect();return b.width>=4&&b.height>=4;});const vals=pts.map(el=>{const b=el.getBoundingClientRect();const cs=getComputedStyle(el);return {size:parseFloat(el.getAttribute('r')||'0')||Math.max(b.width,b.height)/2,fill:(el.getAttribute('fill')||cs.fill||'').trim()};}).filter(v=>Number.isFinite(v.size)&&v.size>0&&v.fill);const counts={};for(const v of vals){counts[v.fill]=(counts[v.fill]||0)+1;}const categoryBuckets=Object.values(counts).filter(n=>n>=8).length;const sizes=vals.map(v=>v.size);const min=Math.min(...sizes),max=Math.max(...sizes);return pts.length>=90&&categoryBuckets>=4&&min>=4.5&&min<=7&&max>=25&&max<=32&&(max-min)>=18;})()

(()=>{const state=window.__scatter_two_filter;if(!state)return false;const countPts=()=>{const roots=['#pointsGroup','#data-layer','#plot-points','#points-layer','#main-svg','#mainSvg','#scatterPlot','svg'];for(const sel of roots){const root=document.querySelector(sel);if(!root)continue;const pts=[...root.querySelectorAll('circle')].filter(c=>{const s=getComputedStyle(c),r=c.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;});if(pts.length>=10)return pts.length;}return 0;};const after2=countPts();const nums=((document.body.innerText||'').match(/\b\d{1,3}\b/g)||[]).map(Number);const countTextSynced=nums.some(n=>n===after2)||nums.some(n=>n<state.after1&&n>=20&&!state.nums0.includes(n));return after2<state.after1&&after2>=20&&after2<=80&&countTextSynced;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).map(svg=>({svg,r:svg.getBoundingClientRect()})).filter(o=>o.r.width>180&&o.r.height>180).sort((a,b)=>b.r.width*b.r.height-a.r.width*a.r.height);if(!svgs.length)return false;const main=svgs[0].svg;const axisSnap=()=>[...main.querySelectorAll('text')].filter(visible).map(t=>[(t.textContent||'').trim(),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('x')||t.getBoundingClientRect().left),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('y')||t.getBoundingClientRect().top)].join(':')).join('|');const miniSnap=()=>{const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,#minimapViewport,#miniViewport,#minimap-viewport,#viewport-rect')].filter(visible).map(r=>{const b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return {el:r,area:b.width*b.height,x:Math.round(b.left),y:Math.round(b.top),w:Math.round(b.width),h:Math.round(b.height),cls:r.getAttribute('class')||'',id:r.id||''};}).filter(o=>o.area>20);const candidates=rects.filter(o=>/mini|view|viewport/i.test(o.cls+' '+o.id)).concat(rects.filter(o=>o.area<12000));return candidates.map(o=>[o.x,o.y,o.w,o.h,o.cls,o.id].join(':')).join('|');};const r=main.getBoundingClientRect();window.__scatter_zoom_snap={axis:axisSnap(),mini:miniSnap(),target:main};main.dispatchEvent(new WheelEvent('wheel',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,deltaY:-900,clientX:r.left+r.width*.55,clientY:r.top+r.height*.45}));return true;})()

(()=>{const before=window.__scatter_zoom_snap;if(!before)return false;const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const main=before.target;const axis=[...main.querySelectorAll('text')].filter(visible).map(t=>[(t.textContent||'').trim(),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('x')||t.getBoundingClientRect().left),Math.round(+t.getAttribute('y')||t.getBoundingClientRect().top)].join(':')).join('|');const rects=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect,#minimapViewport,#miniViewport,#minimap-viewport,#viewport-rect')].filter(visible).map(r=>{const b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return {area:b.width*b.height,x:Math.round(b.left),y:Math.round(b.top),w:Math.round(b.width),h:Math.round(b.height),cls:r.getAttribute('class')||'',id:r.id||''};}).filter(o=>o.area>20);const mini=rects.filter(o=>/mini|view|viewport/i.test(o.cls+' '+o.id)).concat(rects.filter(o=>o.area<12000)).map(o=>[o.x,o.y,o.w,o.h,o.cls,o.id].join(':')).join('|');return before.axis.length>0&&before.mini.length>0&&axis!==before.axis&&mini!==before.mini;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["0-1000,", "2x-20x", "5-30,", "1000", "100", "point"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg circle", "gte": 80}, {"selector": "svg circle", "gte": 50}, {"selector": "circle", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Minimap mirrors the 100-point dataset and exposes a viewport rectangle

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).map(svg=>({svg,r:svg.getBoundingClientRect(),points:[...svg.querySelectorAll('circle,.data-point')].filter(visible).length})).filter(o=>o.r.width>80&&o.r.height>70).sort((a,b)=>b.r.width*b.r.height-a.r.width*a.r.height);const main=svgs.find(o=>o.r.width>180&&o.r.height>180);const mini=svgs.find(o=>main&&o.svg!==main.svg&&o.r.width<300&&o.r.height<260&&o.points>=90);if(!main||!mini)return false;const rects=[...mini.svg.querySelectorAll('rect')].filter(visible).map(r=>{const b=r.getBoundingClientRect();return {w:b.width,h:b.height,area:b.width*b.height,cls:r.getAttribute('class')||'',id:r.id||''};});const viewport=rects.find(r=>r.area>20&&r.area<mini.r.width*mini.r.height*.95&&(/view|viewport|mini/i.test(r.cls+' '+r.id)||r.w<mini.r.width*.95||r.h<mini.r.height*.95));return main.points>=90&&mini.points>=90&&!!viewport;})()

prompt: 使用SVG构建带有回归分析的散点图。30个数据点展示房价(Y, $K)与建筑面积(X)的关系。数据包含异常值。功能：带方程(y=mx+b)和R-squared显示的线性回归线。切换多项式回归(阶数2,3)。下方残差图(显示与回归线的偏差)。回归线周围的置信区间带(95%)。点击交互式添加/删除数据点。异常值检测：超出2个标准差的点高亮显示为红色。统计面板：两个变量的均值、中位数、标准差。导出数据为CSV。

test_cases.name: Regression scatter binds house-price data, diagnostics, and export controls instead of only rendering an SVG

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();if(/\bNaN\b|\bundefined\b|\[object Object\]|ReferenceError|TypeError|SyntaxError/i.test(text))return false;const svg=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].some(visible);const pts=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle,circle')].filter(visible).filter(c=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>=3&&r.height>=3;}).length;const domain=/house|home|price|\$\s*k|\$k/i.test(text)&&/square|sq\.?\s*ft|footage/i.test(text);const equation=/\by\s*=\s*[-+]?\d*\.?\d+(?:\s*\*?\s*x|x)\s*[+-]\s*\d*\.?\d+/i.test(text);const r2=/(r\s*(?:[- ]?squared|²|\^2|2)?|r-squared|r2)\s*(?:score)?\s*[:=]?\s*(?:0?\.\d+|1(?:\.0+)?)/i.test(text);const diagnostics=[/residual/i,/confidence|95%/i,/outlier/i,/median|mean|std/i,/csv|export/i].filter(r=>r.test(text)).length;return svg&&pts>=25&&domain&&equation&&r2&&diagnostics>=4;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();if(/\bNaN\b|undefined|\[object Object\]/i.test(text))return false;if(/\by\s*=\s*[-+]?\d*\.?\d+\s*\*?\s*x\s*[+-]\s*[+-]\s*\d/i.test(text))return false;const eq=text.match(/\by\s*=\s*([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)\s*\*?\s*x\s*([+-])\s*(\d*\.?\d+)/i)||text.match(/\by\s*=\s*([-+]?\d*\.?\d+)x\s*([+-])\s*(\d*\.?\d+)/i);if(!eq)return false;const slope=Number(eq[1]);const intercept=Number((eq[2]||'+')+eq[3]);if(!Number.isFinite(slope)||!Number.isFinite(intercept))return false;const r2=/(r\s*(?:[- ]?squared|²|\^2|2)?|r-squared|r2)\s*(?:score)?\s*[:=]?\s*(?:0?\.\d+|1(?:\.0+)?)/i.test(text);const domain=/house|real estate|price|\$k/i.test(text)&&/square|sq\.?\s*ft|footage/i.test(text);return r2&&domain;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Heatmap table renders with colored cells

prompt: 创建一个可排序数据表, 单个HTML文件。显示10个国家的经济数据: 国家, GDP(万亿美元), 人口(亿), 人均GDP(美元), GDP增长率(%), HDI指数。数据内置。点击列头排序(升序/降序切换, 排序箭头指示)。搜索框过滤国家名。GDP增长率用绿/红色标注正/负。人均GDP单元格背景色渐变(值越高越深)。固定表头, 内容可滚动。斑马纹行。

test_cases.name: Economic table keeps required GDP, population, per-capita, growth, and HDI columns with 10 country rows

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const headers=['country','gdp','population','per capita','growth','hdi'].every(x=>text.includes(x));const rows=document.querySelectorAll('tbody tr, table tr, [role=row]').length>=10;const nums=(text.match(/\d+(?:\.\d+)?/g)||[]).length>=25;return headers&&rows&&nums;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const metrics=['gdp','population','per capita','growth','hdi'].every(x=>text.includes(x));const nums=(text.match(/\d+(?:\.\d+)?/g)||[]).length>=30;const countries=(text.match(/united states|china|japan|germany|india|united kingdom|france|brazil|canada|italy/g)||[]).length>=5;return metrics&&nums&&countries;})()

请提供需要翻译的英文 HTML/Web 开发任务描述文本。

一旦您提供了具体内容，我将按照以下规则进行翻译：

- 技术术语保留英文（如 HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Canvas, SVG, API, DOM 等）
- 颜色值（如 #hex）、尺寸单位（如 px/rem/%）、数字和选择器保持原样
- 保持与原文相同的详细程度和具体性
- 只输出翻译后的文本，不添加解释或引号

请粘贴您需要翻译的英文内容。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 构建一个COVID风格的流行病学仪表盘，整合于单个HTML文件中。包含多个SVG图表及交互式日期范围选择器。图表包括：(1) 每日新增病例面积图（90天模拟数据，7天移动平均线叠加层），(2) 累计病例折线图，(3) 按年龄组划分的水平条形图（0-17、18-34、35-54、55-74、75+），(4) 康复vs活跃vs死亡堆叠面积图，(5) 地理表格（10个区域附带sparklines）。日期范围滑块可同时过滤所有图表。摘要卡片展示：总病例数、活跃病例数、康复病例数、死亡病例数、CFR%。提供切换功能：线性/对数Y轴。采用深色主题配红色强调色。

prompt: 创建一个电商运营数据大屏, 单个HTML文件, 适合16:9全屏展示。布局: 顶部大标题+实时时间。左栏: 实时订单滚动列表(每3秒新增一条模拟订单), 今日GMV(数字翻牌动画)。中央: 中国地图热力图(用SVG简化地图, 10个省份, 颜色深浅表示订单量)。右栏: 品类销售排名(水平条形图, 8个品类), 用户来源饼图(4个渠道)。底部: 24小时订单量折线图(实时更新)。深蓝科技风, 发光边框效果。数字滚动动画。全部数据模拟, 不依赖外部API/库。

test_cases.name: Bottom 24-hour order volume chart renders hourly SVG marks and updates the current hour from new orders

prompt: 在一个HTML文件中创建一个财务投资组合分析仪表盘。包含多个交互式SVG可视化图表：(1) 投资组合价值折线图，带基准对比（S&P 500），双Y轴，(2) 资产配置矩形树图（stocks、bonds、real estate、crypto、cash——每个都有细分），(3) 风险收益散点图（每个持仓作为一个气泡，size=allocation %），(4) 股息收入柱状图（月度，12个月），(5) 业绩归因瀑布图（starting value → gains/losses by category → ending value）。时间范围选择器（1M/3M/6M/1Y/ALL）更新所有图表。带sparklines的持仓表格。打印友好模式按钮。深色主题配gold accent。

s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const geom=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg polyline,svg rect,svg circle,table tr,svg text,text')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return [el.tagName,Math.round(r.x),Math.round(r.y),Math.round(r.width),Math.round(r.height),(el.textContent||'').trim(),el.getAttribute('d')||el.getAttribute('points')||''].join(':');}).join('|');const semantic=()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(s=>{const r=s.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>40&&r.height>30;});const line=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg polyline')].filter(el=>((el.getAttribute('d')||el.getAttribute('points')||'').length>20)).length>=2&&/s&p|benchmark/.test(text);const treemap=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>8&&r.height>8;}).length>=10&&/stocks|bonds|real estate|crypto|cash/.test(text);const scatter=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg circle')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>=4&&r.height>=4;}).length>=5&&/risk|return|allocation/.test(text);const dividends=/dividend|income/.test(text)&&[...document.querySelectorAll('svg rect')].filter(el=>el.getBoundingClientRect().height>10).length>=12;const waterfall=/waterfall|attribution|starting value|ending value|gain|loss/.test(text);const holdings=/holdings?/.test(text)&&document.querySelectorAll('table tr').length>=6;return svgs.length>=5&&line&&treemap&&scatter&&dividends&&waterfall&&holdings;};const before=geom();const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,[role=button],[role=tab],label,li,a,span')].find(el=>/\b(1M|3M|6M|1Y|ALL)\b/i.test((el.innerText||el.textContent||'')+' '+(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')));if(!btn)return false;btn.click();await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,800));return semantic()&&geom()!==before;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["average person drinks 3 cups/day", "#1 most traded commodity after oil", "2.25 billion cups consumed daily", "grown in 70+ countries", "2.25 billion", "3 cups"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "section, article, div", "gte": 4}, {"selector": "section", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Coffee infographic binds all four prompted facts to visible text

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const fact1=/2\.25\s*(billion|b|bn)/.test(text)&&/cups?\s+(consumed\s+)?daily|daily\s+.*cups?/.test(text);const fact2=/70\s*\+?/.test(text)&&/countries|country/.test(text);const fact3=/#\s*1|number\s*1|no\.\s*1/.test(text)&&/traded\s+commodity|commodity/.test(text)&&/oil/.test(text);const fact4=/3\s*(cups?\/day|cups?\s*(per|a)?\s*day|average\s+cups?)/.test(text);return fact1&&fact2&&fact3&&fact4;})()

prompt: 创建一个关于互联网使用的信息图, 单个HTML文件。竖向布局, 5个数据点: (1) 全球网民53亿人 (2) 日均上网时间6小时58分 (3) 社交媒体用户49亿 (4) 移动端占比59% (5) 视频流量占82%。每个数据点: 大号数字+图标(emoji)+简短描述。进度条或环形百分比图表示比例数据。蓝色科技风。

test_cases.name: 数字显示
标题

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=e=>{if(!e)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(e),r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=s=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const iconRe=/[\u{1F300}-\u{1FAFF}\u2600-\u27BF\u2300-\u23FF]/u;const emojiLeaves=[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].filter(e=>visible(e)&&iconRe.test(e.textContent||'')&&![...e.children].some(c=>iconRe.test(c.textContent||'')));const modules=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,.stat-card,.card,[class*=card]')].filter(visible);const timeOk=modules.some(m=>{const t=norm(m.innerText||m.textContent||'');if(!(/daily|average|time|usage/.test(t)&&/58/.test(t)&&/6\s*h|6\s*hrs?|\b6\b/.test(t)))return false;const timeWidgets=[...m.querySelectorAll('[class*=time],.time-visual,.time-display,[class*=clock]')].filter(visible);const widgetOk=timeWidgets.some(w=>{const wt=norm(w.innerText||w.textContent||'');return /58/.test(wt)&&(/6\s*h|6\s*hrs?|\b6\b/.test(wt));});const ringOk=!!m.querySelector('svg')&&/6\s*h|6\s*hrs?|\b6\b/.test(t)&&/58/.test(t);return widgetOk||ringOk;});return emojiLeaves.length>=2&&timeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&Number(s.opacity||1)>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const raw=document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'';if(/\bNaN\b|\bundefined\b|\[object Object\]|ReferenceError|TypeError|SyntaxError/i.test(raw))return false;const nodes=[...document.querySelectorAll('body,section,article,li,div,svg,text,[aria-label],[title],[alt],[data-target],[data-percent],[style]')];const textOf=el=>((el.innerText||el.textContent||'')+' '+['aria-label','title','alt','data-target','data-value','data-percent','style','class','id'].map(a=>el.getAttribute&&el.getAttribute(a)||'').join(' ')).replace(/\s+/g,' ').toLowerCase();const joined=nodes.map(textOf).join(' ');const stats=[/5\.3\s*(?:b|billion)?|5,?300\s*(?:m|million)?/,/6\s*(?:h|hr|hours?)\s*58|6[:：]\s*58|6\s*hours?\s*58|58\s*(?:m|min|minutes?)/,/4\.9\s*(?:b|billion)?|4,?900\s*(?:m|million)?/,/59\s*%|data-percent=.?.?59|width\s*:\s*59%|--[^:]{0,30}:\s*59/,/82\s*%|data-percent=.?.?82|width\s*:\s*82%|--[^:]{0,30}:\s*82/];const allStats=stats.every(r=>r.test(joined));let statModules=0;for(const re of stats){if(nodes.some(el=>visible(el)&&re.test(textOf(el))))statModules++;}const percentVisuals=[...document.querySelectorAll('progress,meter,svg circle,svg rect,[class*=progress i],[class*=bar i],[class*=ring i],[class*=circle i],[style*=width],[style*=--percent],[data-percent]')].filter(visible).length;const icons=(raw.match(/[\u{1F300}-\u{1FAFF}\u{2600}-\u{27BF}]/gu)||[]).length+[...document.querySelectorAll('[class*=icon i],img,svg')].filter(visible).length;return allStats&&statModules>=5&&percentVisuals>=2&&icons>=1;})()

prompt: 使用HTML/CSS/SVG构建一个关于互联网历史的时间线信息图。采用垂直时间线设计，内容卡片左右交替排列。包含8个里程碑：1969 ARPANET、1971 Email、1983 TCP/IP、1989 WWW、1993 Mosaic Browser、1998 Google、2004 Facebook、2007 iPhone。每个卡片包含：大号年份、标题、简短描述（1-2句话）、小图标。连接线在每个里程碑处设有圆点。每个卡片具有滚动触发的淡入动画。颜色从顶部复古风格（sepia）渐变至底部现代风格（蓝色）。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Visual infographic renders

prompt: 创建一个对比信息图：使用 HTML/CSS/SVG 制作电动车 vs 汽油车对比。双栏布局，中间有分隔线。并排比较6项指标：购买价格（$35K vs $28K）、年度燃料成本（$500 vs $1800）、维护费用（$300 vs $700）、CO2排放量（0 vs 4.6吨）、续航里程（300mi vs 400mi）、充电/加油时间（8h vs 5min）。每项指标显示为从中心向外延伸的对向水平条形图。优胜者用对勾标记突出显示。总结：5年总拥有成本，以大型对比数字呈现。简洁现代的设计，采用绿色（电动）和灰色（燃油）配色方案。

test_cases.name: Five-year ownership cost comparison is shown with nonzero totals

steps.expression: (()=>{const t=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');const hasTco=/(5\s*-?\s*year|five\s*year).{0,120}(total|ownership|cost)|total.{0,120}(ownership|5\s*-?\s*year)/.test(t);const money=(t.match(/\$\s*(?!0(?:\D|$))\d{2,3}\s*,?\s*\d{3}|\$\s*(?!0(?:\D|$))\d{2}\s*k/g)||[]).length;const zeroBad=/\$\s*0(?!\.\d)\b|save\s+\$\s*0(?!\.\d)|saves?\s+you\s+\$\s*0(?!\.\d)/.test(t);return hasTco&&money>=2&&!zeroBad;})()

test_cases.name: JS validation checks prompt-grounded structure instead of a malformed or vacuous selector

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["5 year", "1800", "co2", "500", "4.6", "300"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg, section, article", "gte": 4}, {"selector": "tr", "gte": 6}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个完整的年度报告信息图, 单个HTML文件, 长页面可滚动。章节: (1)公司概览: logo占位, 成立年份, 员工数(动画计数器), 办公地点地图(SVG简化)。(2)财务亮点: 年收入(大数字+同比增长箭头), 利润率仪表盘, 季度趋势折线图。(3)产品矩阵: 4个产品卡片, 每个有用户数和评分。(4)用户增长: 面积图显示12个月用户增长, 里程碑标注(突破100万/500万等)。(5)团队: 环形图显示部门人数分布。(6)展望: 3个目标进度条。平滑滚动导航(顶部锚点链接)。打印版本按钮(隐藏动画/简化排版)。深色商务风, 渐变色彩。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const chart=document.querySelector('svg,canvas');const marks=document.querySelectorAll('svg rect, svg circle, svg path, svg line, svg polyline, svg polygon, table tr').length;const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg text,text,h1,h2,h3,figcaption,th')].filter(visible).length;return chart!==null&&marks>=4&&labels>=2;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["12-", "financial", "overview", "employee", "revenue", "company"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()
